zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Bourne於1137年出生在法國奧維豪-洛易波內時，她的父親Richard de Born17歲，母親Matilda Aleanore De Dommart18歲。她於1165年與William de Tracy在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1199年在英國享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Bourne于1137年出生在法国奧維豪-洛易波內时，她的父亲Richard de Born17岁，母亲Matilda Aleanore De Dommart18岁。她于1165年与William de Tracy在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1199年在英国享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived beside a stream, from southern Middle English bourne, Old English burna, burne ‘spring, stream’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Bourn in Cambridgeshire or Bourne in Lincolnshire. In surnames the reference is often to an old stream called burna, surviving as the name of a farm. This word was replaced as the general word for a stream in southern dialects by Old English brōc (see Brook ) and came to be restricted in meaning to a stream flowing only intermittently, especially in winter.

variants.name: Burn
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): variant of   Bourne  .

variants.name: Born
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Heinz, Helmut, Berthold, Frieda, Friedrich, Fritz, Gerhard, Horst, Jutta.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French borgne ‘one-eyed, squint-eyed’.

variants.name: Cockburn
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and northern English: habitational name from a place in Berwickshire named Cockburn, from Old English cocc ‘cock, rooster’ (or the related byname Cocca) + burna ‘stream’ (see Bourne ). This surname is traditionally pronounced Coburn.

variants.name: Bournes
meanings: English: variant of Bourne with plural or post-medieval exrescent -s.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Bourne was born in 1137, in Borne, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, France, her father, Richard de Born, was 17 and her mother, Matilda Aleanore De Dommart, was 18. She married William de Tracy in 1165, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1199, in England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Bourne est née en 1137, à Borne, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, France, son père, Richard de Born, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Matilda Aleanore De Dommart, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé William de Tracy en 1165, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1199, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Bourne 1137 in Borne, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Born 17 und ihre Mutter Matilda Aleanore De Dommart 18. Sie hat 1165 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom William de Tracy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1199 im Alter von 62 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Bourne è nata il nel 1137 nel Borne, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, Francia, sua padre, Richard de Born, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Matilda Aleanore De Dommart, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato William de Tracy nel 1165, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1199, nel England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Bourneが1137年にフランスアウバーグンハウテ-ロイアーボルンで生まれた時，父Richard de Bornは17歳，母Matilda Aleanore De Dommartは18歳であった。1165年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでWilliam de Tracyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1199年にイギリスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Bourne(이)가 1137년 프랑스 오버그니 하테-로이르 본에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Born(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Aleanore De Dommart(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 William de Tracy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1199년 영국에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Bourne nasceu em 1137, em Borne, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Richard de Born, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Aleanore De Dommart, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Tracy em 1165, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1199, em Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Bourne родилась в 1137 г. в местности борн, хауте-лоир, аувиргн, Франция, её отцу по имени Richard de Born было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Aleanore De Dommart, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Tracy в 1165 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1199 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise Bourne nació en 1137, en Borne, Haute-Loire, Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Richard de Born, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Matilda Aleanore De Dommart, tenía 18 años. Se casó con William de Tracy en 1165, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1199, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
